title: selaginella plagiochila
intro: Selaginella plagiochila, also known as resurrection fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the spore-producing genus Selaginella. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for infections. The health benefits of Selaginella plagiochila include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Selaginella plagiochila are typically made by drying the plant's leaves and stems, which can be used to create teas, infusions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
